# Commit Message Instructions

- Use an imperative subject line.
- Keep the subject focused on one logical change.
- Mention the subsystem when helpful.
- Avoid claiming a full fix when the change only adds scaffolding,
  instrumentation, or investigation support.

Preferred examples:

- `Scaffold permanent income calculator and settings`
- `Document household affordability patch targets`
- `Add baseline GitHub issue templates and workflows`
